tech_news.title: Prego Pivots From Budget-Tier Pasta Sauce to Small Microphones That Listen to Your Family's Intimate Conversations - Futurism
tech_news.description: Prego, the pasta sauce brand, announced a new lid-shaped device designed to record and preserve family dinner conversations.

tech_news.title: Mozilla Used Anthropic’s Mythos to Find and Fix 151 Bugs in Firefox - WIRED
tech_news.description: The Firefox team doesn’t think emerging AI capabilities will upend cybersecurity long term, but they warn that software developers are likely in for a rocky transition.

tech_news.title: X makes it 1,900 percent more expensive to post links - The Verge
tech_news.description: Posting links to X through custom social media software just got a lot more expensive. As a result, the tech news aggregator Techmeme is removing links from its X posts.

tech_news.title: Framework announces Laptop 13 Pro, ‘the MacBook Pro for Linux users’ - The Verge
tech_news.description: Framework’s new Laptop 13 Pro, on preorder today, takes on the M5 MacBook Pro with a CNC aluminum chassis, battery life, and its modular upgradable design.

tech_news.title: Alien: Rogue Incursion gets surprise release on Nintendo Switch 2 - Nintendo Everything
tech_news.description: Alien: Rogue Incursion – Part One: Evolved Edition has not only been announced for Nintendo Switch 2, but you can get it right now. Survivos is putting the action-horror Alien shooter on Nintendo’s latest console today. Mouse controls are supported, so when a…

tech_news.title: Diablo IV: Lord of Hatred Review - Embrace The Hate - Game Informer
tech_news.description: Lord of Hatred is an exceptional cherry on top of Diablo IV, further cementing the entire package as among the best action RPGs of the generation.

tech_news.title: Former Pinterest team redesigns email with Extra — and it’s actually good - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: Extra, from a team of former Pinterest designers and engineers, reimagines email around your life instead of the traditional inbox.
